ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the incident (e.g., non-criminal, felony, misdemeanor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the incident */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the incident occurred */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date the incident occurred */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time the incident occurred */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the incident occurred */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the incident (e.g., arrest, booking, conviction) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address where the incident occurred */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the incident location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the incident location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the incident (including GPS coordinates) */,
  "pd_id" TEXT /* Police department ID associated with the incident */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "reporting_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who reported the incident */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suspect involved in the incident */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the victim involved in the incident */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_address FOREIGN KEY ("address") REFERENCES addresses ("street"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES districts ("district_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_pd_id FOREIGN KEY ("pd_id") REFERENCES police_departments ("pd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_resolution FOREIGN KEY ("resolution") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the district's central location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the district's central location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the district */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the category */,
  "legal_implications" TEXT /* Legal implications of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "legal_outcome" TEXT /* Legal outcome of the resolution */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the resolution was reached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street name */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the address is located */,
  "cross_street" TEXT /* Cross street for more precise location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (including GPS coordinates) */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address */,
  "proximity_to_incident" TEXT /* Proximity to other incidents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_departments" (
  "pd_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each police department */,
  "pd_name" TEXT /* Name of the police department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the police department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the department */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., police officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the police department */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the report was submitted */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of the update (e.g., status, evidence) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_updates_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES incident_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations_history" (
  "location_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location history entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "location_date" TEXT /* Date the incident occurred at this location */,
  "location_time" TEXT /* Time the incident occurred at this location */,
  "location_status" TEXT /* Status of the location (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_locations_history_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_locations_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "officer_badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "officer_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "officer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_officers_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
